title: Trump Says US-India Trade Deal Is Coming — But It's Not Done Yet
script: The U.S. and India just finished 4 straight days of trade talks in New Delhi — and both sides say they're close. Trump told reporters Thursday: 'We will get to a deal,' calling Prime Minister Modi a good friend. Negotiators covered market access, tariffs, and customs. A signed agreement would be the first major U.S. bilateral trade deal in more than a decade. But Trump also slammed India's tariff barriers, so the finish line isn't secured yet.
